headings.text: McIntosh and Sonus Faber Partner with Jeep and Lamborghini
Top-Tier Audio at Home and On the Road: McIntosh and Sonus Faber, Partnerships with Jeep and Lamborghini
Detailed Breakdown of McIntosh’s MX1200 Entertainment System
Sonus faber’s Integration in the Lamborghini Revuelto

bodyText: MenuHomeServicesBrandsPortfolioAboutExciting PRoductsContactHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingMcIntosh and Sonus Faber Partner with Jeep and LamborghiniPosted on June 12, 2024Top-Tier Audio at Home and On the Road: McIntosh and Sonus Faber, Partnerships with Jeep and LamborghiniWhen it comes to luxury audio, brands like McIntosh and Sonus faber are renowned for delivering exceptional sound quality. Their recent collaborations with world-class vehicles exemplify how one can maintain the high-fidelity audio experience enjoyed at home, even while on the road.‍‍Detailed Breakdown of McIntosh’s MX1200 Entertainment System24-Channel Premium Amplifier: The MX1200 Entertainment System in the 2024 Jeep Wagoneer S Launch Edition features a 24-channel amplifier, distributing up to 1200 watts of power. This ensures each of the 19 speakers gets the power it needs, resulting in superior sound quality and power distribution. Such a robust setup is essential for maintaining clarity and richness in the audio experience.Speakers and Placement: The system includes a variety of speakers, such as four 6- x 9-inch door speakers, coaxial speakers, and a 12-inch dual voice coil subwoofer. These speakers are strategically placed to create an immersive sound experience. For example, rear speakers mounted in the liftgate play low enough to blend perfectly with the subwoofer, enhancing the overall sound stage.McIntosh Technologies: McIntosh’s patented technologies, including Power Guard and LD/HP (Low Distortion/High Performance), play a crucial role in eliminating distortion and maintaining audio clarity even at high volumes. Power Guard prevents clipping, which can damage speakers and degrade sound quality, while LD/HP ensures pristine sound reproduction across all frequencies.‍‍Sonus faber’s Integration in the Lamborghini RevueltoCollaboration with Lamborghini: Sonus faber and Lamborghini have joined forces to create an unparalleled audio experience in the new Revuelto. This collaboration involved close cooperation between Sonus faber’s R&D team and Lamborghini’s designers, overcoming numerous challenges to integrate high-quality audio seamlessly into the vehicle’s design.Material and Design Choices: The choice of materials, such as natural fiber composites and phase plugs, significantly impacts the sound quality and aesthetics of the audio system. These materials were specifically chosen to enhance the acoustic performance and provide a luxurious look that complements Lamborghini’s design ethos.Speaker Configuration: The Revuelto features a seven-speaker setup, including tweeters, mid-woofers, and full-range speakers. Each speaker is meticulously placed to deliver an exceptional sound experience, with two full-range speakers positioned behind the pilot and co-pilot for an immersive surround effect.Amplifier and DSP: The system includes a Full Class D amplifier delivering up to 750 watts of power, paired with a powerful DSP. This combination ensures smooth transitions between electrical signals and acoustical tones, providing high-fidelity sound and a rich audio experience.‍Market Position and Future TrendsThe partnerships between McIntosh, Sonus faber, and leading automotive brands like Jeep and Lamborghini are shaping expectations in the luxury audio market. These collaborations highlight the demand for high-quality audio experiences both at home and on the road, setting new standards for sound performance in luxury vehicles and residential settings.‍‍Experience McIntosh and Sonus faber Systems: AVIR’s selection and newly renovated showroom offer a taste of the luxury and sophistication found in the world’s finest audio systems, seamlessly integrating top-tier technology into your lifestyle.Come experience the high-quality sound of McIntosh and Sonus faber systems. Scheduled demos and expert consultations are available to showcase the capabilities of these world-class audio systems in a controlled environment.‍‍If you are interested in scheduling for one of our professional engineers to meet with you or your interior designer for your remodel or new construction project in Palm Desert or rest of the Coachella Valley, we may be reached at:Phone: (760) 799-0881Email: Sales@AVIR.comAsk for Yasin or Charley.‍‍FAQs1. What is the McIntosh MX1200 Entertainment System?The McIntosh MX1200 Entertainment System is a high-end audio system featuring a 24-channel amplifier and 19 speakers, designed for superior sound quality in the 2024 Jeep Wagoneer S Launch Edition.‍2. How many watts of power does the McIntosh MX1200 amplifier provide?The McIntosh MX1200 amplifier provides up to 1200 watts of power, ensuring each speaker receives the power it needs for optimal performance.‍3. What types of speakers are included in the McIntosh MX1200 system?The system includes four 6- x 9-inch door speakers, coaxial speakers, and a 12-inch dual voice coil subwoofer, strategically placed for an immersive sound experience.‍4. What is the role of McIntosh’s Power Guard technology?McIntosh’s Power Guard technology prevents clipping and distortion, protecting the speakers and maintaining sound quality even at high volumes.‍5. How does the Sonus faber system integrate with the Lamborghini Revuelto?Sonus faber’s system integrates seamlessly with the Lamborghini Revuelto, featuring a seven-speaker setup and high-quality materials for superior sound and aesthetics.‍6. What materials are used in Sonus faber’s speakers for the Lamborghini Revuelto?The speakers use natural fiber composites and phase plugs, chosen for their acoustic performance and luxurious appearance.‍7. What is the power output of the amplifier in the Lamborghini Revuelto’s audio system?The amplifier in the Revuelto’s audio system is a Full Class D amplifier delivering up to 750 watts of power, paired with a powerful DSP for high-fidelity sound.‍8. Can I experience McIntosh and Sonus faber audio systems at AVIR’s showroom?Yes, potential customers can schedule demos and consultations at AVIR’s newly renovated showroom to experience McIntosh and Sonus faber audio systems.‍9. How do McIntosh and Sonus faber collaborations impact the luxury audio market?Their collaborations with brands like Jeep and Lamborghini set new standards for high-quality audio in luxury vehicles and residential settings, meeting the demands of discerning consumers.‍10. Where is AVIR’s showroom located?AVIR’s showroom is located in Palm Desert, CA, offering a curated selection of luxury audio products from top brands like McIntosh and Sonus faber.‍Engage the expertsAVIR operates within the Coachella Valley region, providing exclusive smart automation services for residential and commercial properties.Call760.779.0881Visit our Showroom41905 Boardwalk, Suite XPalm Desert, CA 92211NavigationHomeServicesBrandsExciting ProductsPortfolioAboutCareersContactServicesHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingExciting ProductsBrowse some of the most exclusive products we can bring to your next technology installation.Find out moreProudly serving the entire Coachella Valley and surrounding areas:BanningBeaumontBermuda DunesBig BearCathedral CityCoachellaIdyllwildIndian WellsIndioJoshua TreeLa QuintaLake ArrowheadMoreno ValleyMurrietaPalm DesertPalm SpringsRancho MirageRedlandsRiversideSan BernardinoTemeculaThermalThousand PalmsYucaipaYucca ValleyCopyright © 2023.
